rationale: The cited paper is used only as a general example that consumer behavior can be shaped by social context, alongside several other references. The citing article does not rely on its specific positive contagion findings to build hypotheses, operationalize constructs, or interpret the EEG mechanism tests. Instead, the core framework is social facilitation theory (Zajonc) plus ERP emotion-attention literature, so this citation functions as background mention rather than a direct intellectual basis.
